name: Домен Бури
description: Gods whose portfolios include the Tempest Domain—including {@deity Talos}, {@deity Umberlee}, {@deity Kord}, {@deity Zeboim}, the Devourer, {@deity Zeus}, and {@deity Thor}—govern storms, sea, and sky. They include gods of lightning and thunder, gods of earthquakes, some fire gods, and certain gods of violence, physical strength, and courage. Tempest clerics are aggressive warriors whose booming prayers embolden allies and batter foes.

features.name: Tempest Domain Spells
features.description: Your connection to this divine domain ensures you always have certain spells ready. When you reach a Cleric level specified in the Tempest Domain Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Wrath of the Storm
features.description: You can thunderously rebuke attackers. When a creature within 5 feet of you that you can see hits you with an attack, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to force the creature to make a Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes {@damage 2d8} Lightning or Thunder damage (your choice) on a failed saving throw, and half as much damage on a successful one. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Destructive Wrath
features.description: You can use your Channel Divinity to wield the power of the storm with unchecked ferocity. When you roll Lightning or Thunder damage, you can expend a use of your Channel Divinity to deal maximum damage instead of rolling.

features.name: Thunderbolt Strike
features.description: When you deal Lightning damage to a Large or smaller creature, you can also push it up to 10 feet away from you.

features.name: Stormborn
features.description: You have a flying speed equal to your walking speed whenever you are not underground or indoors.
